layer: Miss Lana / full site launch gate
description: Complete the final pre-launch trust, media, quality, operations, and release gate. Install only permission-safe real media and verified reviews, verify every route and lead path, confirm redirects and search controls, then remove site-wide noindex and perform a controlled production launch. The site must remain light and public pricing must remain only From $350.
non_goals: Do not add audience-size price tiers, a calculator, online payment, customer accounts, or advanced CRM automation
Do not create blog posts, city pages, broad public-school procurement materials, or large illustration production
Do not finalize trademark-gated logo, mascot, merchandise, or print work
Do not publish child faces, school logos, reviews, awards, or documents without recorded permission/source
Do not introduce new service claims, policies, prices, or add-ons during QA
Do not launch paid advertising as part of this task

decision_basis.origin: User-approved seven-task implementation plan after live-site review and owner questionnaire review on 2026-06-27.
investigation_findings: Launch requires a working form, real media, verified reviews, correct redirects, Search Console/GBP readiness, and full QA
The user wants a light theatre site rather than a dense technical-company presentation
Owner media is scattered across phone, Telegram, and files and permissions are not consistently documented
At least five real verified reviews are the current trust target
Noindex removal must be the last controlled step after all launch blockers pass
Pricing remains intentionally limited to From $350

must_not_violate: No launch with unresolved BLOCKER or HIGH findings
No invented reviews or fabricated source attribution
No identifiable child media without adequate permission evidence
No private address or reserve phone publication
Do not remove noindex until form delivery, redirects, routes, metadata, analytics, trust content, and QA pass
Keep /design and other internal surfaces noindex or unavailable in production
Preserve the approved light content hierarchy and Lantern Light system

forbidden_execution_patterns: No visual redesign disguised as launch polish
No mass media upload without curation, compression, alt text, dimensions, and permission status
No review publication based on anonymous screenshots without source/permission tracking
No launch based only on local tests
No silent deferral of failed live form, redirect, SSL, indexing, or analytics checks
execution_guardrails: Use a launch checklist with explicit PASS / BLOCKED / NOT APPLICABLE evidence
Treat real-media permission status as a hard gate for identifiable children
Keep illustrations subordinate to real performance evidence
Optimize media before implementation and reserve dimensions to avoid CLS
Run production smoke tests immediately before and after noindex removal
Maintain rollback instructions for deployment, form provider, and indexing state
If any BLOCKER or HIGH issue appears, keep noindex and stop launch

readiness_notes: Production form credentials and domain access are available
Launch media and review candidates have been supplied with source/permission evidence
Owner can respond to leads consistently

in_scope: Media inventory, permission classification, curation, compression, responsive variants, captions, and alt text
Install a minimum launch media set across Home, School, Birthday, Shows, About, Gallery, and OG surfaces
Collect and publish at least five verified reviews with source/permission, balancing parent and educator proof where possible
Verify owner/team factual content that is actually published
Implement/verify privacy and cookie disclosures required by the actual form/analytics stack
Full route, content, mobile, accessibility, performance, browser, form, email, analytics, metadata, schema, redirect, SSL, 404, robots, and sitemap QA
Configure/verify analytics conversion events without personal data
Controlled noindex removal, sitemap submission, live inquiry test, and launch monitoring
Launch runbook, rollback checklist, and first-30-day monitoring plan

steps.title: Build the launch evidence register
actions: Inventory all candidate photos, videos, reviews, awards, school/client names, team facts, and permissions
Classify each item as publishable, needs permission, internal-only, or rejected
Select a minimum launch set and identify blockers
steps.expectation: No trust asset can be published without traceable source and permission status

steps.title: Prepare and install real media
actions: Create optimized responsive image/video variants with consistent warm treatment and natural skin tones
Reserve dimensions, use correct loading priority, add captions/alt text, and avoid identifiable child faces without permission
Replace public placeholders and verify the site remains fast
steps.expectation: The site demonstrates real theatre work without privacy or performance regressions

steps.title: Publish verified social proof
actions: Verify and obtain permission for at least five launch reviews
Separate parent and educator context where evidence allows
Publish only exact approved wording or faithful translation with source context
Add Review schema only if it accurately matches visible eligible reviews and current search guidelines
steps.expectation: The site has a real, traceable trust layer

steps.title: Complete privacy and measurement readiness
actions: Verify actual analytics/form technologies and add only required privacy/cookie disclosure
Confirm conversion events for form success and contact clicks without personal data
Verify Search Console and GBP operational readiness and account ownership status
steps.expectation: Measurement and disclosures match the technologies actually used

steps.title: Run full pre-launch QA
actions: Test every public route, navigation path, contact action, form state, email delivery, lead persistence, metadata, schema, sitemap, robots, 404, redirects, SSL, and analytics event
Test representative mobile/desktop viewports, keyboard navigation, screen-reader labels, contrast, reduced motion, Core Web Vitals, image/video loading, and browser compatibility
Perform factual proofread against canon and confirm Pricing contains only From $350
Record findings with severity and block launch on BLOCKER/HIGH
steps.expectation: A signed checklist shows zero unresolved launch-blocking defects

steps.title: Execute controlled launch
actions: Create deployment and indexing rollback checkpoints
Remove site-wide public noindex while keeping /design and internal surfaces protected
Deploy, verify live canonical/robots/sitemap behavior, submit sitemap, and inspect representative URLs
Run a live inquiry and verify owner delivery, persistence, analytics, and customer-visible state
Verify protective/legacy redirects and monitor 404/error/form logs
steps.expectation: The site is publicly indexable, operational, measurable, and recoverable

steps.title: Establish the first-30-day monitoring plan
actions: Define daily first-week and weekly first-month checks for form delivery, response time, errors, 404s, indexing, queries, conversion, and lead quality
Create an evidence-based optimization backlog without city pages or blog assumptions
steps.expectation: Post-launch decisions will be based on real traffic and inquiry data

success_criteria: At least five real verified reviews are published with source and permission records
Launch media is real, optimized, permission-safe, and replaces public placeholders
Every public route and conversion path passes full QA with zero open BLOCKER/HIGH findings
Production form delivery, lead persistence, failure behavior, and analytics are proven live
Canonical host, SSL, redirects, metadata, schema, robots, sitemap, and 404 behavior are correct
Site-wide public noindex is removed only after all gates pass; internal /design remains protected
Pricing everywhere remains only From $350 with no tiers or calculator
A rollback procedure and first-30-day monitoring plan exist and are readable

manual_checks: Complete and sign the launch checklist with PASS/BLOCKED evidence
Verify published review and media permission records
Submit a real production inquiry from mobile and desktop and confirm full delivery path
Inspect representative pages in Google Rich Results Test or equivalent current validator where applicable
Verify public pages are indexable after launch and /design remains noindex/unavailable
Confirm all numeric public pricing is limited to From $350
Confirm the site still feels light, warm, and theatre-led rather than technical or corporate

closure_sequence: Step 1: Scope verification — confirm all steps, success_criteria, and deliverables are complete; confirm execution-safety compliance (no non_goals fixed, no forbidden_execution_patterns violated, execution_guardrails respected)
Step 2: Automated verification — run only the required_commands explicitly listed for the scoped task, confirm all pass
Step 3: Reviewer-grade pre-closure code review — analyze all changes against the review dimensions, record explicit findings with BLOCKER / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW / NOTE severity
Step 4: Closure resolution — resolve or explicitly defer findings with severity, write the final verification summary, and update the task report
Step 5: PROJECT_PROGRESS update — append the substantive change entry only after all previous closure steps pass

post_actions: Begin traffic acquisition only after stable launch monitoring confirms form and response operations
Create later optimization TUNGs from real Search Console, analytics, GBP, and lead-quality evidence
